property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Python314\Scripts\;C:\Python314\;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Python311\Scripts\;C:\Python311\;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files (x86)\NVIDIA Corporation\PhysX\Common;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA Corporation\NVIDIA NvDLISR;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;E:\Sajith\Selenium\driver;C:\Program Files (x86)\DVC (Data Version Control);C:\Users\Admin\anaconda3\;C:\Users\Admin\anaconda3\Scripts;C:\Users\Admin\anaconda3\Library\bin\;C:\Users\Admin\anaconda3\Lib;C:\apache-cassandra-4.0.8\bin;C:\apache-cassandra-4.0.8\;C:\Program Files (x86)\Plantronics\Spokes3G\;C:\ProgramData\chocolatey\bin;C:\Users\Admin\anaconda3\lib;C:\Users\Admin\anaconda3\lib\site-packages;C:\gradle;C:\gradle\bin;C:\gradle\lib;C:\Program Files (x86)\GnuWin32\bin;C:\Program Files\WinMerge;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker\resources\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\Amazon\AWSCLIV2\;C:\apache-maven-3.9.12;C:\apache-maven-3.9.12\bin;C:\terraform;C:\Users\Administrator\.local\bin;C:\Program Files\PostgreSQL\15\bin;C:\Users\Administrator\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Launcher\;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Shell 8.4\bin\;C:\Users\Administrator\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\Administrator\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Users\Administrator\AppData\Local\Programs\Ollama;C:\Users\Administrator\.local\bin;C:\Program Files\PostgreSQL\15\bin;;.

invalidRequestType_throwsBusinessException_postingFailed
testcase.system-out: {"timestamp":"2026-03-22T06:05:37.3830007Z","@version":"1","message":"Posting saved | sourceName=IMX requestType=NOT_A_REAL_TYPE","logger":"com.accountposting.service.impl.AccountPostingServiceImpl","thread":"main","level":"INFO","level_value":20000,"appName":"account-posting","requestType":"NOT_A_REAL_TYPE","postingId":"99","e2eRef":"E2E-IT-1000","app":"account-posting"} {"timestamp":"2026-03-22T06:05:37.3830007Z","@version":"1","message":"INVALID_ENUM_VALUE | requestType 'NOT_A_REAL_TYPE' is not valid. Accepted values: [IMX_OBPM, IMX_CBS_GL, FED_RETURN, GL_RETURN, MCA_RETURN, BUY_CUSTOMER_POSTNG, ADD_ACCOUNT_HOLD, CUSTOMER_POSTING]","logger":"com.accountposting.service.AccountPostingRequestValidator","thread":"main","level":"WARN","level_value":30000,"appName":"account-posting","requestType":"NOT_A_REAL_TYPE","postingId":"99","e2eRef":"E2E-IT-1000","app":"account-posting"}
